version_notes: v6.0.0 splits the v5.2.0 monolith into a 6-skill family. This is the orchestrator: it owns the .job-hunter/ workspace lifecycle (init/export/import), routes a job-search task to the right member specialists (career-profile, job-search, resume-tailor, application-tracker, outcome-learning), and enforces the anti-fabrication family invariant. Members each work standalone; the orchestrator routes + merges.
